How Mercury Works

Your AI job-search companion — skills + a local dashboard over LinkedIn MCP, Chrome MCP & ACP

Request — in chat or from the dashboard's Launch tab
"Improve my profile" · "Find backend roles in São Paulo" · "Grill me on recent work" · "Tailor my resume for these roles" · "Connect me with Uber recruiters"
Agent matches intent → loads the right skill (via opencode or Claude Code over ACP)
Experience Bank — "grill me"
Periodic · not per-application
A STAR-style self-interview you run occasionally (quarterly / after shipping something). Seeds from your existing bank + base resume + LinkedIn so it only asks about gaps, then stores tagged achievements. Resume Tailor reads this pool to surface relevant work that doesn't fit on the short base resume.
experience-bank ──writes──▶ .mercury/experience/ ──read-only──▶ resume-tailor
The per-application pipeline
Profile Optimizer
①
"audit my profile", "get more recruiter messages"
1
Pull profile + analytics
All sections, search appearances, views, connections
LinkedIn MCP · get_person_profile
2
Audit + rank pitfalls
Headline, location, Open-to-Work, skills, empty sections
Agent reasoning
3
Edit live in browser
Open-to-Work, headline, skills, languages, About, projects
Chrome MCP · navigate/fill/click
4
Record metrics
Score + analytics snapshot → charts over time
mercury metric record
✅ Discoverable profile + scored snapshot
Job Scout
②
"find roles at X", "remote jobs paying USD"
1
Gather criteria
Companies, location, work type, level, stack, comp
Agent reasoning
2
Parallel job search
Multiple queries by company + location + work type
LinkedIn MCP · search_jobs
3
Fetch + assess fit
Reqs, comp, English; Strong / Good / Stretch + caveats
LinkedIn MCP · get_job_details
4
Save shortlist
Ranked roles w/ fit, IDs, links
mercury job save
📋 Prioritized shortlist in your hub
Resume Tailor
③
"tailor my resume for these roles"
1
Gather inputs
Base resume + experience bank + profile + job details
.mercury/experience/
2
Gap / match analysis
Strong / transferable / gap; "in your bank, not resume"
Agent reasoning
3
Tailor + cover letter
ATS-aligned Typst per role; pulls bank entries; full letter
Agent reasoning
4
Save application
Resume + cover + report + keyword score
mercury application add
📝 Role-tailored resume + cover letter
Recruiter Outreach
④
"find recruiters at X", "connect me with contacts"
1
Resolve company URNs
People-search needs numeric IDs — names are ignored
LinkedIn MCP · get_company_profile
2
Search + prioritize
Same city > 2nd-degree > mutuals > technical title
LinkedIn MCP · search_people
3
Send tailored notes
<300 chars; user confirms; batched ≤10–15/session
LinkedIn MCP · connect_with_person
4
Track pipeline
Kanban status: pending → accepted → replied → …
mercury recruiter add
🤝 Warm pipeline — tracked outreach
Every skill writes through the mercury CLI into one local ~/.mercury/mercury.db — the same store the dashboard reads and live-updates over WebSocket. One schema, one source of truth.

LinkedIn MCP

Reads profiles & analytics, searches jobs/people/companies, sends connection requests. get_person_profile, search_jobs, search_people, connect_with_person.

Chrome MCP

Drives a logged-in Chrome session (auto-started, no manual launch flags) to make profile edits LinkedIn's API can't — Open-to-Work, About, skills, projects. Uses the pipeline tool for multi-step edits.

Dashboard + ACP

mercury dashboard opens a local hub (Svelte + SQLite) for hybrid search and the Launch tab, which runs any skill via opencode or Claude Code over ACP with a live agent stream.

LinkedIn MCP call Chrome MCP browser action Agent reasoning mercury CLI → SQLite
